palette_hint: deep charcoal background (#1c1c1c), warm off-white text (#f0ece4), rust-orange accent (#c95f2e)
type_style: system serif (Georgia) for headings and post titles, system sans-serif for body and nav, normal weight, generous line-height of 1.8
description: A personal blog by a night-owl writer named Vera Osei, covering late-night reflections, long-form essays, and annotated reading lists.
constraints: single centered column with max-width of 620px, generous left/right padding
dark background throughout all pages — no light mode switching
rust-orange (#c95f2e) used only for hyperlinks, post dates, and section headings — nowhere else
thin 1px horizontal rules (#3a3a3a) used between every section and between every list entry
navigation is a plain horizontal row of text links at the top, no borders or boxes, active page shown in rust-orange

page_specs.journal: The homepage lists the 6 most recent journal entries by title, date in rust-orange, and a single sentence teaser, each separated by a thin rule. A short italic site tagline ('Written between midnight and 4 a.m.') sits below the blog name at the top.
page_specs.essays: A vertical list of 7 long-form essay titles, each with a publication date and a two-line description of the argument or theme. Entries are separated by thin horizontal rules. A brief header note explains these are pieces Vera spent more than a week writing.
page_specs.reading-log: A running annotated list of 10 books Vera has read this year, each with author, title in italic, a one-sentence verdict, and a personal rating out of 5 written as plain text (e.g. '4 out of 5'). A short paragraph at the top explains her reading habits and why she logs publicly.
page_specs.about: Three paragraphs: who Vera is, why she started writing at night, and what the blog is not about. Ends with her city (Accra, Ghana) and a line about her day job as a secondary school literature teacher.
page_specs.contact: A short paragraph inviting readers to reach out for essay feedback or book recommendations. Displays Vera's email address in large rust-orange text, followed by two social handles (Mastodon and a newsletter link) as plain text lines.
